analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a black holes themed website. The HTML file is incomplete with missing sections and buttons. The CSS file is partially implemented with a dark, cosmic theme but lacks full animations and interactive elements. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functions. The theme should focus on black holes, with animated objects, slides, and an animated page to enhance user engagement.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Complete the CSS file to include all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
